title: Contextual Help Slide-Out Panel via WordPress API
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want clicking the help icon to open a slide-out panel with contextual help articles, so that I can access relevant documentation without leaving the current page.
description:
Modify the help icon in the top toolbar to open a left slide-out panel that dynamically loads help content from the datatoolspro.com WordPress site.

## Implementation
- Fetch help content from `https://datatoolspro.com/wp-json/wp/v2/pages/8880`
- Parse the HTML content to extract all links
- Display links as clickable elements that open tutorials in a new window
- Each page in the app should navigate the slide-out to an anchor matching the current PHP filename for contextual help

## Reusable Pattern
The function should be reusable so that every "?" info icon in the app can open the help panel to a specific deep-link/article. This creates a user experience where help is always one click away with contextual relevance.

## Code
JavaScript function fetches the WordPress page JSON, parses `content.rendered` HTML, extracts all `<a>` elements, and creates a clickable link list in the slide-out panel.
acceptance_criteria: Help icon opens a slide-out panel from the left side
Panel loads help articles from the WordPress API
Each article displays as a clickable link opening in a new window
Help function is reusable across different info icons
Panel content loads without errors when the API is available
ux_changes: New contextual help slide-out panel that fetches and displays help articles from WordPress. Reusable function pattern enables any info icon to trigger contextual help. Links open documentation in new windows.
implementation_notes: Client-side JavaScript fetches WordPress page JSON and parses the rendered HTML content to extract article links. The contextual navigation feature (matching PHP filename to anchor) was discussed but the full implementation was deferred to a follow-up. Developer asked for clarification on the anchor-matching concept.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the slide-out panel with WordPress API integration. Discussion around the contextual anchor-matching feature — developer needed clarification on what 'navigate to an anchor matching the PHP filename' meant. Basic implementation completed and pushed to staging.
